backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing a Change Management System with role-based access control, change request workflow (submit, review, approve, implement, close), user profiles, file storage integration, and approval history tracking.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of the AAI logo in the application header with high confidence, referencing Header.tsx and multiple component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including authentication flow, dashboard components, change request management UI, and styling with OKLCH color system.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, featuring purple/blue primary colors for a professional IT management application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Change Management System application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component managing authentication state with Internet Identity, conditional rendering of login/profile setup/dashboard pages, and theme provider with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ChangeRequestDet: Detailed change request view component with role-based approval actions, team assignment, implementation tracking, file uploads for RCA documents, and full audit history display.
frontend/src/components/ChangeRequestLis: Change request list component with search functionality, status and priority filtering, color-coded badges, and view details navigation.
frontend/src/components/CreateChangeRequ: React form component for creating change requests with file uploads (implementation and rollback plans), date/time selection, priority levels, and validation. Converts files to ExternalBlob format with upload progress tracking and submits via useCreateChangeRequest hook.
frontend/src/components/DashboardOvervie: Dashboard component displaying change request statistics, pending requests filtered by user role, and recent requests with status badges. Includes role-specific filtering logic and formatting utilities for priorities, statuses, and timestamps.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying copyright year with centered text and border styling.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header with AAI logo, user profile dropdown showing name/email/role, theme toggle (light/dark mode), and logout functionality. Uses Internet Identity for authentication management.
frontend/src/components/ReportsView.tsx: Reports dashboard displaying change request analytics with bar/pie charts (using recharts) for priority, status, and success rate distributions. Includes JSON export functionality for generating downloadable reports.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing the backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state. Invalidates dependent queries when actor changes and initializes access control with admin token.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, and auth client lifecycle. Provides authentication status states and identity object to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, change requests, and related data using the backend actor. Includes queries for getting profiles, change requests by ID/status, stats, and mutations for creating, approving, and updating change requests.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space. Defines design tokens for colors, borders, and UI elements including sidebar, charts, and semantic color roles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page with tabbed interface for overview, change request list, creation form, and reports. Manages navigation between tabs and handles viewing change request details.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page component that displays system features and provides Internet Identity authentication button with loading states.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: Profile setup form for new users to enter name, email, contact, department, and CMS role. Validates inputs and saves profile using mutation hook.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and cleanup methods for sensitive parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions for colors using OKLCH, container settings, border radius variables, animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state file for an Airport Authority of India CMS application tracking features to remove caffeine.ai attribution and add AAI logo to the header. Contains schema version 1.0.0, project state version 5, with two existing features and one pending feature request.
